1-1: MY GRANDFATHER VERUS: Character and self-control.
1-2: MY FATHER (FROM MY OWN MEMORIES AND HIS REPUTATION): Integrity and manliness.
1-3: MY MOTHER: Her generosity and calm nature.
2-1: When you wake up in the morning, tell yourself: The people I deal with today will be meddling, ungrateful, arrogant...
